title: BetterPingDisplay
description: BetterPingDisplay appends a color-coded ping to player names in the tab list and above their heads. It’s a lightweight, configuration-free mod compatible with all Fabric 1.21+ versions.
body:
# BetterPingDisplay

**BetterPingDisplay** is a minimalist, client-side Fabric mod designed to give you instant feedback on your connection quality. It seamlessly integrates real-time ping indicators into the Minecraft interface, showing you exactly how much latency every player (including yourself) has at any given moment.

### 🌟 Key Features
* **Tab List Integration:** Automatically appends the ping value to every player's name in the player list (Tab).
* **Nametag Support:** Displays the ping directly above player heads in the world, so you always know who might be lagging during a fight or interaction.
* **Smart Color-Coding:** Uses an intuitive traffic-light system to represent connection quality:
    * 🟢 **Green (< 80ms):** Smooth gameplay, excellent connection.
    * 🟡 **Yellow (80-150ms):** Noticeable latency, keep an eye on it.
    * 🔴 **Red (> 150ms):** High lag, gameplay might be affected.
* **Premium UI Design:** Features a neutral white separator (` | `) to keep the interface clean, while highlighting the actual ping value in its corresponding status color.

### 🚀 Why BetterPingDisplay?
* **Zero Configuration:** Just drop it in and play. No commands, no menus, no fluff.
* **Maximum Performance:** Built to be as lightweight as possible. It runs standalone and does **not** require the Fabric API, reducing memory usage and load times.
* **Version Compatibility:** Specifically engineered for the new rendering systems in Minecraft 1.21, but compatible with all versions from 1.21 up to 1.21.11 and beyond.

### 📦 Installation
1. Ensure you have the **Fabric Loader** installed for Minecraft 1.21+.
2. Download the mod.
3. Place the file into your `mods` folder.
4. Launch the game and enjoy a better overview of your connection!

---
*Standalone | Lightweight | 1.21.x Ready*
